creator: michipili@gmail.com
text:
We want to have ocaml-4.01.0 in the ports and take the opportunity of the upgrade to add staging.  I made some progress on this but still have two small issues:

- The underlying build system uses strip on installed, read-only, files.
- The package list must be actualised.

Once these small issues are fixed, the port can be tested.

Progresses can be followed there:
 https://bitbucket.org/michipili/ports-bsd/branch/ocaml-4.01.0
